title: Department Manager Vacancy at Poojara Telecom - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Poojara Telecom - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Poojara Telecom in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poojara Telecom:
Poojara Telecom is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poojara Telecom!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
